page_metadata.biotools__summary: A package for performing clustering analysis using T-RFLP data. T-RFLP is a newly developed molecular fingerprinting technique mainly used to investigate population structures in microbial communities.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: A package for performing clustering analysis using T-RFLP data. T-RFLP is a newly developed molecular fingerprinting technique mainly used to investigate population structures in microbial communities.
